arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Aston Villa in the Premier League on Sunday, looking to address a poor run of results. The Red Devils are winless in four games across all competitions and required a stoppage-time equaliser from Harry Maguire to rescue a draw at Porto on Thursday, having earlier surrendered a two-goal lead at The […] The post Manchester United XI vs Aston Villa – Mainoo fit to return first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: As the pressure continues to mount on Erik ten Hag in the Manchester United dugout, the Dutch coach could well be out of a job if his side fall to defeat at the hands of Aston Villa on Sunday. The Villans are already six points better off than Man Utd this season and head into Sunday's clash off the back of a memorable and hard-fought 1-0 win over Bayern Munich in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Ronaldo asks Al Nassr to sign Man City superstar; Man Utd identify Ten Hag replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United are expected to open talks with ex-Bayern Munich manager Thomas Tuchel if the club opt to part ways with Erik ten Hag. The manager was previously heavily linked with a move to Old Trafford when Ten Hag's job was under threat during the 2023/24 season. Cristiano Ronaldo has asked Al Nassr to make an audacious offer to sign Kevin De Bruyne once the midfielder's current deal at Manchester City expires.

arts.ttl: I would gobsmacked if Unai Emery wanted to replace Erik ten Hag as Manchester United manager
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under pressure as Man Utd manager, while Unai Emery is thriving at Aston Villa.
